title: Part Feeding Wizard General
description:
Part Feeding Wizard General

General

This screen is used for configure general settings.

Item	Description

Enter name for new part	Write the name of the part.

(Half-width alphanumeric characters and
		 underscores only.

Up to 32 characters in length)

Select feeder number	Select the feeder number used with this
		 part.

You can check the feeder number on the
		 System Configuration screen.

Select robot number	Select the robot number.

This table describes the basic operation of the part wizard.

The part wizard is controlled using the five buttons at the bottom of the window.

Button	Description

Vision Guide	Displays the Vision Guide screen.

Use this screen to create vision sequences.

Cancel	Stops the Part Wizard.

Back	Returns to the previous STEP.

Next	Proceeds to the next STEP.

Finish	Finish the Part Wizard.
